# Key People in GraphRAG

## Satya Nadella
Satya Nadella is the CEO of Microsoft. Under his leadership, Microsoft invested heavily in AI research, including the development of GraphRAG at Microsoft Research.

## Andrew Ng
Andrew Ng is a pioneer in machine learning and co-founder of Coursera. He advocates for accessible AI education and has commented on the importance of retrieval-augmented generation for enterprise applications.

## Andrej Karpathy
Andrej Karpathy previously led AI at Tesla and worked at OpenAI. In April 2026, he published the "LLM Wiki" pattern as a GitHub gist, proposing that LLMs should compile knowledge into persistent wikis rather than retrieving from vector databases on every query.
